_doc: AKOS domain map. Maps a repo (matched against any lowercased path component of the session cwd) to the AKOS knowledge domains relevant to it. A repo gets AKOS units injected ONLY when it has BOTH a brief on disk AND an entry here (conservative: better silence than irrelevant units). Target domains are intersected with the domains actually present in that repo's brief; a target with no matching brief section contributes nothing. Domains in a brief: saas, sales, ai_automation, scaling, mindset, gaming, copywriting, seo, marketing, ecommerce, outreach, social_media, wealth.
